mapper.sql: WITH classified AS ( SELECT t.id, t.trans_date, t.description AS note, cat.type, cat.category_id, cat.category, cat.icon, cat.display_amount AS amount, pay.account_id, pay.account FROM fin_transactions t JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT e.account_id AS category_id, a.name AS category, a.icon, LOWER(a.account_type) AS type, CASE WHEN a.account_type = 'EXPENSE' THEN CASE WHEN e.direction = 'DEBIT' THEN e.amount ELSE -e.amount END WHEN a.account_type = 'INCOME' THEN CASE WHEN e.direction = 'CREDIT' THEN e.amount ELSE -e.amount END ELSE 0 END AS display_amount FROM fin_entries e JOIN fin_accounts a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE e.trans_id = t.id AND e.book_id = t.book_id AND a.account_type IN ('EXPENSE', 'INCOME') ORDER BY CASE WHEN a.account_type = 'EXPENSE' THEN 0 ELSE 1 END, e.id LIMIT 1 ) cat ON TRUE LEFT JOIN LATERAL ( SELECT e.account_id, a.name AS account FROM fin_entries e JOIN fin_accounts a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE e.trans_id = t.id AND e.book_id = t.book_id AND a.account_type IN ('ASSET', 'LIABILITY') ORDER BY e.id LIMIT 1 ) pay ON TRUE WHERE t.book_id = #{bookId} )

sql.if: AND (note ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%') OR category ILIKE CONCAT('%', #{keyword}, '%'))

mapper.select:
SELECT COALESCE( (SELECT COALESCE(SUM(a.initial_balance), 0) FROM fin_accounts a WHERE a.book_id = #{bookId} AND a.account_type = #{accountType} AND a.is_leaf = TRUE AND a.is_archived = FALSE) + (SELECT COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN #{accountType} = 'ASSET' AND e.direction = 'DEBIT' THEN e.amount WHEN #{accountType} = 'ASSET' AND e.direction = 'CREDIT' THEN -e.amount WHEN #{accountType} = 'LIABILITY' AND e.direction = 'CREDIT' THEN e.amount WHEN #{accountType} = 'LIABILITY' AND e.direction = 'DEBIT' THEN -e.amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) FROM fin_entries e JOIN fin_accounts a ON e.account_id = a.id JOIN fin_transactions t ON e.trans_id = t.id WHERE e.book_id = #{bookId} AND a.account_type = #{accountType}
AND t.trans_date <= #{asOf} ) , 0)

SELECT a.id, a.name, a.account_type, a.icon, COALESCE(a.initial_balance, 0) + COALESCE(SUM( CASE WHEN a.account_type = 'ASSET' AND e.direction = 'DEBIT' THEN e.amount WHEN a.account_type = 'ASSET' AND e.direction = 'CREDIT' THEN -e.amount WHEN a.account_type = 'LIABILITY' AND e.direction = 'CREDIT' THEN e.amount WHEN a.account_type = 'LIABILITY' AND e.direction = 'DEBIT' THEN -e.amount ELSE 0 END ), 0) AS balance FROM fin_accounts a LEFT JOIN fin_entries e ON a.id = e.account_id AND e.book_id = #{bookId} WHERE a.book_id = #{bookId} AND a.account_type IN ('ASSET', 'LIABILITY') AND a.is_leaf = TRUE AND a.is_archived = FALSE GROUP BY a.id, a.name, a.account_type, a.icon, a.initial_balance, a.sort_order ORDER BY a.sort_order ASC NULLS LAST, a.id ASC

SELECT t.trans_date::date AS date, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.account_type = 'INCOME' AND e.direction = 'CREDIT' THEN e.amount WHEN a.account_type = 'INCOME' AND e.direction = 'DEBIT' THEN -e.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN a.account_type = 'EXPENSE' AND e.direction = 'DEBIT' THEN e.amount WHEN a.account_type = 'EXPENSE' AND e.direction = 'CREDIT' THEN -e.amount ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expense FROM fin_transactions t JOIN fin_entries e ON t.id = e.trans_id JOIN fin_accounts a ON e.account_id = a.id WHERE t.book_id = #{bookId} AND e.book_id = #{bookId} AND a.account_type IN ('INCOME', 'EXPENSE') AND t.trans_date >= #{startDate} AND t.trans_date <= #{endDate} GROUP BY t.trans_date::date ORDER BY t.trans_date::date

SELECT id, type, category, icon, ABS(amount) AS amount, note, account, account_id, trans_date FROM classified WHERE 1 = 1
ORDER BY trans_date DESC, id DESC LIMIT #{size} OFFSET #{offset}

SELECT COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'income' THEN ABS(amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS income, COALESCE(SUM(CASE WHEN type = 'expense' THEN ABS(amount) ELSE 0 END), 0) AS expense, COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 'income' THEN 1 END) AS income_count, COUNT(CASE WHEN type = 'expense' THEN 1 END) AS expense_count FROM classified WHERE trans_date >= #{startDate} AND trans_date <= #{endDate}
